summary: Frontend testing for PillarPageLayout component on DinePage and CarePage. All 6 requested features are working correctly on both desktop and mobile viewports.
critical_code_review_comments: Console log shows 'Loaded undefined products via pillar resolver' on both DinePage and CarePage - this is a minor logging issue where the products count shows as undefined instead of actual count
React key warning: 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' in DinePage select element
context_for_next_testing_agent: PillarPageLayout component tested and verified working on DinePage and CarePage. Features tested: dark gradient hero (UnifiedHero), Products/Services toggle, subcategory pills, 'Shopping for another dog?' link, and Mira Chat Widget.

dine_page.dark_hero_design: PASS - UnifiedHero component renders with dark gradient styling
dine_page.subcategory_pills: PASS - All Dine, Fresh Meals, Treats, Desi Treats, Frozen, Supplements pills visible
dine_page.shopping_for_another_dog: PASS - Link visible with text 'Shopping for another dog?'
dine_page.mira_chat_widget: PASS - Ask Mira widget visible in bottom right

care_page.dark_hero_design: PASS - UnifiedHero component renders with dark gradient styling
care_page.products_services_toggle: PASS - Toggle visible and functional, toggle interaction working
care_page.subcategory_pills: PASS - All Care, Grooming, Health, Supplements, Spa pills visible
care_page.shopping_for_another_dog: PASS - Link visible with text 'Shopping for another dog?'
care_page.mira_chat_widget: PASS - Ask Mira widget visible in bottom right

mobile_responsive.dine_page_mobile: PASS - All components render correctly on 390x844 viewport
mobile_responsive.care_page_mobile: PASS - All components render correctly on 390x844 viewport
